extra.reasoning: The variable stiff_neck does not appear in the condition of any rule. The only rules are raise_back_pain (IF back_pain THEN urgent) and raise_dizziness (IF dizziness THEN urgent), both priority 2, with a default of routine for any unset output. Acuity is therefore a function solely of back_pain and dizziness: urgent if either is true, routine otherwise. Because stiff_neck is never read, toggling it from false to true (with all other inputs fixed) leaves acuity completely unchanged. The monotonicity property requires that setting stiff_neck true yields acuity no lower than before; since acuity is identical (equal), "no lower" is trivially satisfied for every one of the input assignments. No input or execution can lower acuity by setting stiff_neck true, so the property holds over the entire input space.
